Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Idaho Custom Bath to get the job done right.

“Idaho Custom Bath transformed our outdated kitchen into a modern masterpiece! The team was professional, communicative, and meticulous. We especially appreciated their attention to detail and their willingness to work with us to create a space that truly reflects our style. The project was completed on time and within budget. Highly recommend!”

Sarah M. Kitchen Remodel
Mar 15, 2025

“We hired Idaho Custom Bath to remodel our master bathroom, and we're very happy with the results. The quality of the workmanship is excellent, and the team was always respectful of our home. There were a couple of minor hiccups along the way, but they were quickly resolved. Overall, a great experience.”

John B. Bathroom Remodel
Apr 1, 2025

“Idaho Custom Bath did an amazing job finishing our basement. The space is now a functional and comfortable living area that our family loves. The team was professional, reliable, and easy to work with. They helped us navigate the permitting process and ensured that everything was up to code. We highly recommend them!”

Emily K. Basement Finishing
May 10, 2025

“We couldn't be happier with our new deck! Idaho Custom Bath designed and built a beautiful and functional outdoor living space that we'll enjoy for years to come. The team was professional, efficient, and detail-oriented. They used high-quality materials and paid close attention to every detail. A fantastic job!”

David L. Deck Construction
Jun 20, 2025

“Idaho Custom Bath did a great job painting the exterior of our house. The team was professional, courteous, and efficient. They used high-quality paints and took the time to properly prepare the surface. The finished product looks fantastic, and we've already received compliments from our neighbors.”

Jessica P. Exterior Painting
Jul 5, 2025

“We replaced all of the windows in our home with Idaho Custom Bath, and we're very pleased with the results. The new windows are energy-efficient and have significantly reduced our energy bills. The installation team was professional and efficient, and they cleaned up after themselves thoroughly. A great investment!”

Michael S. Window Replacement
Aug 12, 2025
